DigiPro Team Members:

Rajesh Gurumoorthy - Co-Founder & Partner (20 years experience) | Specialization: Risk Management, Shared Services, BPO, Strategy, Operations, Insurance Underwriting.

Janani Iyer - Co-Founder & Partner (10 years experience) | Specialization: Digital Marketing, Brand Strategy, Social Media Growth, Online Branding.

Pavithra Krishnamourthy - Client Growth Manager | Specialization: Client Success, Marketing Strategy, Relationship Management.

Vishnu Anil - Lead - Graphic Design (10 years experience) | Specialization: Creative Design, Adobe Creative Suite, Campaign Design, Visual Storytelling.

Grishma Raj - Lead - Content (10 years experience) | Specialization: Content Strategy, Marketing Content, Journalism, Narrative Development.

Gowtham Srinivas - Lead - Brand Strategy | Specialization: Brand Strategy, Copywriting, AI, Video Content, Operations.

Vinod Emmanuel - Digital Marketing Specialist | Specialization: Strategic Marketing, Campaign Optimization, Client Solutions, Growth Marketing.

Gokul R - Senior Visualizer (6 years experience) | Specialization: Video Editing, Brand Visualization, Creative Direction.

Harishkumar GR - Senior Graphic Designer (6 years experience) | Specialization: Brand Design, Visual Identity, Creative Storytelling.

Jayakeerthikha - Content Writer (4 years experience) | Specialization: Long-form Content, B2B Content, B2C Content, Research Writing.

Pravin Rajamani - Web Developer | Specialization: Web Development, Frontend Development, Story-driven Websites, Clean Code.

Shiva Teja - Digital Marketing Executive | Specialization: Web Design, Graphic Design, AI-driven Marketing, Fintech Marketing.

Rajkumar Thanigaimalai - Digital Marketing Executive | Specialization: Sales, Social Media, Brand Strategy, Campaign Execution.

Subash R - Graphic Designer (3 years experience) | Specialization: Brand Collaboration, Creative Design, Visual Identity.

Vijayakumar - Web Developer | Specialization: Web Development, UI/UX, Usability Optimization.

Honey Jain - Graphic Designer | Specialization: Canva Design, Brand Visuals, Creative Layouts.

Sowmithra - Intern - Graphic Design | Specialization: Illustration, Animation, Visual Storytelling.
